" It  is so told ,that there was a dragon on the island of Rhodes in the  1330s, hiding

The bold crimson mask, sharp black shadows, and electric turquoise accents create a powerful balance between tradition and urban energy.

They are archetypes of rebellion, style, and status.

minting_now.description: Kokoro no Hoshi is a hand drawn anime inspired NFT collection built with passion, emotion, and identity at its core. Every piece is uniquely crafted as a true 1/1 artwork, blending aesthetic visuals, detailed character design, and meaningful storytelling.

minting_now.name: HARBOR
minting_now.description: PFP collection for next gen NFT betting platform

minting_now.name: Tiny Turtles
minting_now.description: A collection of 10,000 hand drawn cute turtles on Base

minting_now.name: Mutants On Base
minting_now.description: Mutants On Base | MAPE is an exclusive NFT collection featuring 3,333 uniquely designed digital apes, hosted on the Ape blockchain. Created by NightRare Labs, the team behind the successful collection BABC and BBKC,AOB. Mutants aims to bring fresh energy to the NFT space with its distinctive style a

minting_now.name: Mutant#2
minting_now.description: is a collection of 10,000 Gang Apes mutated by infection with a space virus. Let's gather together and capture as many Mutant Gang as possible to save the Gang Town.

minting_now.name: Ghost Flame
minting_now.description: A street artist who rejects the boring afterlife and carves out his own territory with NFT spray. With rap skills as hot as his flashy gold chains, he is an unrivaled trendsetter sweeping the charts of the ghost world.

Happy National Anime Day!
